description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Doton)

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 18 | Successes: 2

Perform: 6 | Perform DC: 18

Components: C, H

You camouflage yourself near an amount of dirt, rock or stone that can cover your size, gaining a +10 bonus to Hide checks and becoming able to Hide while being observed for as long as you remain immobile. Creatures who can See (Through) Chakra gain a +5 bonus to Spot checks against you while you hide like this.

You can partially merge with any rock or stone formation that can physically contain your body to gain DR 5/-. You must maintain direct contact to the surface you use to hide in and/or merge with. If you lose direct contact, the technique ends.
